commands.review_summary:
Adds a one-time gateway startup warning when local host approvals tighten the requested global exec security policy, shares the clamp predicate with exec-policy reporting, adds focused tests, and updates troubleshooting remediation.

PR surface: Source +73, Tests +171, Docs 0. Total +244 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at the source level: current `main` demonstrably intersects requested exec security with stricter host approvals, reproducing the linked report’s effective `allowlist` outcome after restart. This review did not run the patched gateway, so the new warning itself is not independently reproduced.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Request direct after-fix gateway startup output from the contributor, then perform normal maintainer review and land the PR if that proof matches the tested one-warning behavior.

target.title: Warn when host approvals clamp exec security at startup
target.body:
## Summary

- Warn once during gateway startup when requested global `tools.exec` security is stricter-clamped by the local host approvals file.
- Reuse the same clamp predicate as `openclaw exec-policy show`, keep the diagnostic read-only, and suppress node/sandbox-managed scopes.
- Update troubleshooting guidance to point users at `openclaw exec-policy show` and the `yolo` preset instead of config-only edits.

Fixes #92206.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Gateway-local exec requests can be configured as `tools.exec.security=full` while host approvals still clamp the effective policy to `allowlist`; startup now surfaces that mismatch instead of silently leaving users to discover it later.

Real environment tested: Local macOS source checkout, Node 24.16.0, isolated temp `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH` and `OPENCLAW_HOME`, no live channel/provider credentials.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Created a temp config with `tools.exec.host=gateway` and `tools.exec.security=full`, created temp host approvals with `defaults.security=allowlist`, ran source `openclaw exec-policy show --json`, and compared SHA-256 hashes for both temp files before/after.

Evidence after fix: Focused startup tests verify the gateway log warning is emitted once for the global local-file clamp. The real source CLI proof below shows `exec-policy show --json` resolving the same temp setup to `requested=full`, `host=allowlist`, `effective=allowlist`, with unchanged config and approvals hashes:

```text
proof_dir=/var/folders/lp/9mmnwgx50yn6n6j8yt6_p3400000gn/T/openclaw-92206-proof.5Yj2r8
configPath=/var/folders/lp/9mmnwgx50yn6n6j8yt6_p3400000gn/T/openclaw-92206-proof.5Yj2r8/openclaw.json
approvalsPath=/var/folders/lp/9mmnwgx50yn6n6j8yt6_p3400000gn/T/openclaw-92206-proof.5Yj2r8/home/.openclaw/exec-approvals.json
scope=tools.exec
runtimeApprovalsSource=local-file
requested=full
host=allowlist
effective=allowlist
note=stricter host security wins
configHashBefore=a814e6e0e49f30ec3059967025ad1a1011386df8ca03846182ff56015c103a8b
configHashAfter=a814e6e0e49f30ec3059967025ad1a1011386df8ca03846182ff56015c103a8b
approvalsHashBefore=7b667e80d008eef61df2c2f2615f397d81d7e0c8e23a3b5b1ffa1accef79df44
approvalsHashAfter=7b667e80d008eef61df2c2f2615f397d81d7e0c8e23a3b5b1ffa1accef79df44
```

Observed result after fix: The effective security floor remained clamped to `allowlist`; neither config nor approvals were mutated.

What was not tested: Live message-channel delivery and remote node runtime approvals; node and sandbox scopes are intentionally skipped by this startup warning and covered by focused unit tests.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `PATH=/Users/harjothk/.nvm/versions/node/v24.16.0/bin:$PATH pnpm docs:list`
- `/Users/harjothk/.nvm/versions/node/v24.16.0/bin/node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/gateway-cli/exec-policy-startup-warning.test.ts src/cli/gateway-cli/run.option-collisions.test.ts src/infra/exec-approvals-policy.test.ts src/cli/exec-policy-cli.test.ts src/commands/doctor-security.test.ts src/agents/exec-defaults.test.ts src/agents/bash-tools.exec.security-floor.test.ts`
- `PATH=/Users/harjothk/.nvm/versions/node/v24.16.0/bin:$PATH pnpm tsgo:core`
- `PATH=/Users/harjothk/.nvm/versions/node/v24.16.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/infra/exec-approvals-effective.ts src/cli/gateway-cli/exec-policy-startup-warning.ts src/cli/gateway-cli/exec-policy-startup-warning.test.ts src/cli/gateway-cli/run.ts src/cli/gateway-cli/run.option-collisions.test.ts`
- External autoreview: clean, no accepted/actionable findings, overall patch correct.

## Notes

- This PR is AI-assisted by Codex and was opened as a draft for maintainer/human review.
- A candidate local agent transcript was found but not included because transcript insertion requires explicit approval and preview/review.
